title: mentha lloverana
intro: Mentha lloverana, also known as Lloverana mint, is a species of mint plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha lloverana include relieving digestive issues, reducing nausea, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
